name: Campaign board shows the pipeline kanban
description: With at least one seeded or previously created campaign, a campaign opens on its Board with the four pipeline columns, cards stamped with an owner, and working Calendar and Results tabs.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app and go to the Campaigns view.
Open the first campaign in the list (or the campaign that is already active).
Verify the campaign opens on a Board tab showing kanban columns named Plan, Draft, In review, and Approved.
Verify at least one card is visible on the board and that cards carry an owner (a member name or avatar stamp).
Switch to the campaign's Calendar tab.
Verify the calendar renders without errors.
Switch to the campaign's Results tab.
Verify the results view renders without errors (empty-state copy is acceptable, a crash or blank screen is not).
